ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population count for the ethnicity */,
  "geographic_distribution" TEXT /* Brief description of the geographic distribution of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "homeownership_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each homeownership statistic */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic location */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of homeowners within the age group and ethnicity */,
  "homeowners" INTEGER /* Number of homeowners in thousands */,
  "total_households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in thousands */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of homeowners in the age group and ethnicity */,
  "median_house_price" REAL /* Median house price in the age group and ethnicity */,
  "homeownership_trend" TEXT /* Brief description of the trend in homeownership rates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homeownership_stats_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homeownership_stats_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_homeownership_stats_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household characteristic */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the homeownership statistic */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of households */,
  "average_house_price" REAL /* Average house price */,
  "average_mortgage_rate" REAL /* Average mortgage interest rate */,
  "median_house_age" INTEGER /* Median age of houses in the age group and ethnicity */,
  "average_family_size" REAL /* Average family size in the age group and ethnicity */,
  "homeownership_duration" REAL /* Average duration of homeownership in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_characteristics_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES homeownership_stats ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy became effective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "target_ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target ethnicity for the policy */,
  "target_age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target age group for the policy */,
  "target_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target location for the policy */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the policy's impact on homeownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_government_policies_target_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_location_id") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_government_policies_target_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_government_policies_target_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary location of the financial institution */,
  "number_of_branches" INTEGER /* Number of branches */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the financial institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_institutions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the real estate company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary location of the real estate company */,
  "number_of_properties" INTEGER /* Number of properties managed */,
  "total_value_of_properties" REAL /* Total value of properties managed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_estate_companies_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geographic_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client subscription */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription is next due for renewal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the subscription (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_subscriptions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., government, financial institution, real estate company) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, demographic analysis) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the methodology used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the report (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the report access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
